final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled food photography image of fashionable coffee and desserts in a Korean cafe setting, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean-cafe Instagram aesthetic shot on smartphone — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays on each element: outline tracings around objects, arrows and dashed lines as visual guides, steam wisps, sparkle marks, small heart and emoji-like doodles — exact placement and density are yours
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets as focal subjects (no people)
Scene/backdrop: needs a Korean cafe interior or tabletop flat-lay context — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, bright, Instagram-story atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, muted-pastel direction consistent with Korean cafe aesthetics — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a rough, slightly uneven single-stroke white-pen line quality for all annotations — exact line weight and irregularity are yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotation text (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) near each element, short diary-voice comments in the following style:
  - drink annotation: taste / temperature / mood (e.g. 「やさしい甘さ♡」「ほっこり～」)
  - food annotation: texture / deliciousness (e.g. 「しっとり最高」「たまらん…」)
  - space annotation: atmosphere (e.g. 「落ち着く」「いい時間」)
  - overall caption: one-line summary (e.g. 「幸せすぎた～」)
Constraints: must preserve annotation white-pen line style (細線・一筆書き風・輪郭なぞり); decorative elements (蒸気・キラキラ・ハート・小さい顔文字) must be moderate — leave visual breathing room / 余白; overall finish must feel Instagram Stories × magazine rough-notes style
Avoid: people, faces, overly dense or cluttered annotations
